tool.name: analyze_differential_access
tool.description: Execute structured allow-vs-deny, owner-vs-other, and cross-tenant HTTP comparisons, then record coverage, evidence, and hypotheses when denied contexts behave too much like allowed contexts.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label for the assessment ledger.

parameter.name: component
parameter.description: Component name for the assessment ledger.

parameter.name: surface
parameter.description: Coverage surface being tested, such as "Order differential access".

parameter.name: method
parameter.description: HTTP method for the tested endpoint.

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Absolute URL of the tested endpoint.

parameter.name: cases
parameter.description: List of request variants. Each item must include name and method, and should include expected_access=allow/deny/unknown plus role, tenant, ownership, object_ref, compare_to, session_profile/session_profile_id, path or url, and optional headers/cookies/params/body/json_body overrides.

parameter.name: baseline_case
parameter.description: Optional baseline case name to compare all other cases against.

parameter.name: follow_redirects
parameter.description: Whether redirects should be followed. Default: false.

parameter.name: similarity_threshold
parameter.description: Body-preview similarity threshold for parity detection. Default: 0.98.

parameter.name: success_statuses
parameter.description: Optional list of HTTP status codes to treat as successful access.
